description: Composition Beige kurta made of 100% cotton, has three-quarter sleeves, rounded V-neck, woven tape detailing on the neck, cuffs and hem, ethnic print and vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean only Vintage weaves, classic cuts and contemporary style - all come together in this kurta from diva. Crafted from a soft blended fabric, it offers exemplary comfort all day. Pair it with patialas or churidars and embellished slippers for an ethnic look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5’9”, chest 33” and shoulders 15.5”
